code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let t = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  if i == 0
    result = "#{t} #{t}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{t} #{t}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
